name: Ansible
description: Ansible — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Infrastructure as Code.

seo.title: Ansible Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Ansible analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Best for automated build/test/deploy pipelines. Ansible offers custom pricing.
pros: Global edge network for low-latency delivery
cons: Proprietary edge functions create platform dependency
